decision_convention: Tier A = low-risk + alien>=7 + non-template (fast-track). Tier B = low-risk + alien<7 + non-template. Tier C = med-risk or template-flagged (human gate). Already on disk skipped.

tier_A_fasttrack.name: sports-psychology
tier_A_fasttrack.rationale: Zone of Optimal Functioning (ZOF): 6 psychological states on arousal-performance curve (sleep/deep relaxation/optimal zone/over-arousal/panic/shutdown). Self-determination theory: 6 motivational orientations. Csikszentmihalyi's flow: 6 conditions for flow onset (clear goals, immediate feedback, skill-challenge balance, action-awareness merging, concentration, control). Distinct from cognitive-social-psychology, games-sports.
tier_A_fasttrack.source: Csikszentmihalyi 'Flow' 6 conditions; Hanin ZOF model; SDT 6 orientations (Deci & Ryan)
tier_A_fasttrack.notes: Csikszentmihalyi's 6 flow conditions is a well-documented psychological framework. High alien index — sports + psychology + n=6 is unexpected.

tier_A_fasttrack.name: wine-chemistry
tier_A_fasttrack.rationale: Wine aroma wheel: 6 primary aroma families (fruity, floral, spicy, earthy, woody, other). Fermentation biochemistry: 6-carbon glucose (C6H12O6) → 2 ethanol + 2 CO2 (glycolysis, 6-carbon entry reaction). Tartaric acid: C4H6O6 (6 oxygen atoms). Distinct from wine-enology (organoleptic/sensory focus) and viticulture (grape growing) — this is molecular chemistry.
tier_A_fasttrack.source: Glucose C6H12O6 glycolysis (6-carbon backbone); tartaric acid molecular formula; wine aroma wheel (Noble 1987 6 families)
tier_A_fasttrack.notes: C6H12O6 → glycolysis is a genuine biochemical anchor — 6-carbon sugar is structurally required. The strongest connection in the wine cluster.

tier_A_fasttrack.name: digital-humanities
tier_A_fasttrack.rationale: Text Encoding Initiative (TEI): 6 mandatory elements for minimal valid TEI document (teiHeader, fileDesc, titleStmt, publicationStmt, sourceDesc, body). Six Degrees of Francis Bacon project — the name directly invokes n=6 (small-world network at 6 hops). N-gram analysis: 6-gram is the practical upper limit for NLP language modeling before sparsity dominates. Distinct from linguistics, library-science, writing-systems.
tier_A_fasttrack.source: TEI P5 Guidelines (6 mandatory elements verified); 'Six Degrees of Francis Bacon' project (Carnegie Mellon); 6-gram NLP sparsity threshold
tier_A_fasttrack.notes: TEI 6-element minimum is a verifiable XML standard. 'Six Degrees of Francis Bacon' project title is a direct n=6 invocation. High alien index — humanities sector rare in this corpus.

tier_A_fasttrack.name: biophotonics
tier_A_fasttrack.rationale: Optical biopsy: 6 endogenous fluorophores for label-free imaging (NADH, FAD, collagen, elastin, porphyrins, tryptophan). Photobiomodulation (PBM): 6 treatment parameters (wavelength, irradiance, fluence, pulse, duration, area). Cytochrome c oxidase (COX): 6-copper-center enzyme — the primary chromophore for PBM. COX Z-environment involves 6 metal sites. Distinct from cancer-therapy, medical-device, radiation-biology.
tier_A_fasttrack.source: Zipfel et al. NBTL 2003 (6 endogenous fluorophores for multiphoton imaging); COX 6-metal-center structure
tier_A_fasttrack.notes: 6 endogenous fluorophores is a real biophotonics fact (Zipfel is a seminal paper). COX 6-metal structure is verified biochemistry.

tier_B_approve.name: wildfire-management
tier_B_approve.rationale: Wildfire behavior is modeled on 6 spread vectors (surface/crown/spotting/slope/wind/humidity). The Rothermel fire spread equation uses 6 primary input variables. Incident Command System (ICS) uses 6 functional sections for complex fires. Fire weather index systems (FWI: FFMC, DMC, DC, ISI, BUI, FWI) have exactly 6 components — genuine structural match to n=6, not depth-2 coincidence.
tier_B_approve.source: Rothermel fire model; NWCG ICS 420-1; Canadian FWI system (6 components verified)
tier_B_approve.notes: FWI 6-component structure is a real, independently arrived-at standard. Strong candidate.

tier_B_approve.name: sport-biomechanics
tier_B_approve.rationale: Human movement modeled in 6-DOF (SE(3) group: 3 translation + 3 rotation). Ground reaction force analysis: 6 force plate channels. Gait cycle partitioned into 6 functional phases (loading, midstance, terminal-stance, pre-swing, initial-swing, terminal-swing). The 6-DOF linkage is structurally motivated — not template coincidence. Distinct from existing games-sports (culture) which covers rules/scoring.
tier_B_approve.source: Perry & Burnfield 'Gait Analysis' (6 functional phases); ISO 6 force plate channels; SE(3) kinematics
tier_B_approve.notes: SE(3) 6-DOF is the same structural hook as telepathy domain (ranked #3 surprise). Cross-domain resonance is a strength.

tier_B_approve.name: aquifer-hydrology
tier_B_approve.rationale: Darcy's law for groundwater flow in 6-direction 3D tensor (2x2x2=8 directions, but symmetric tensor has 6 independent components). Aquifer classification: 6 types (unconfined, confined, perched, artesian, fractured, karst). Hydraulic conductivity K varies across 6 orders of magnitude (10^-12 to 10^0 m/s). Distinct from existing water-treatment, desalination, oceanography.
tier_B_approve.source: Domenico & Schwartz 'Physical and Chemical Hydrogeology'; Darcy permeability tensor symmetry (6 independent components)
tier_B_approve.notes: Symmetric permeability tensor having exactly 6 independent components (in 3D) is a genuine geometric fact.

tier_B_approve.name: ferroelectrics
tier_B_approve.rationale: Perovskite crystal structure (ABO3) has 6-coordinate octahedral B-site — same hexagonal coordination as carbon chemistry. BaTiO3 has 6 structural phase transitions counted from 0K to melt. Ferroelectric hysteresis loop characterized by 6 parameters (Pr, Ps, Ec, Pmix, epsilon_r, Curie T). Distinct from existing superconductor, ceramics, material-synthesis.
tier_B_approve.source: Perovskite octahedral coordination (verified crystallography); BaTiO3 phase sequence literature
tier_B_approve.notes: 6-coordinate octahedral structure is the same geometric fact as CN=6 in crystallography — strong structural anchor.

tier_B_approve.name: precision-agriculture
tier_B_approve.rationale: Soil health measured across 6 indicators (pH, N, P, K, organic matter, moisture). NDVI and 5 companion vegetation indices (EVI, SAVI, MSAVI, NDWI, LAI) = 6 spectral indices for crop monitoring. GPS guidance uses 6-satellite minimum for cm-accuracy positioning. Distinct from existing agriculture and ecology-agriculture-food.
tier_B_approve.source: GPS PDOP 6-satellite minimum; soil health indicator frameworks (USDA NRCS); spectral vegetation index suite
tier_B_approve.notes: GPS 6-satellite minimum is a real positioning requirement (geometry of dilution of precision). Solid anchor.

tier_B_approve.name: cold-chain-logistics
tier_B_approve.rationale: Cold chain temperature zones: 6 international tiers (ambient 15-25C, controlled ambient 2-8C, refrigerated 2-8C, frozen -18C, deep frozen -40C, cryogenic -80C to -196C). WHO vaccine cold chain: 6-point temperature monitoring protocol. Refrigerant classification: 6 ASHRAE safety classes (A1-A3, B1-B3). Distinct from food-science, thermal-management.
tier_B_approve.source: ASHRAE refrigerant safety classification (A1/A2L/A2/A3/B1/B2/B3 = 6 classes); WHO cold chain manual; temperature zone standards
tier_B_approve.notes: ASHRAE 6 safety classes is a real standard. 6 temperature zones is an industry convention — verify exact count.

tier_B_approve.name: geomorphology
tier_B_approve.rationale: Davis geographical cycle: 6 erosion stages (initial, youthful, mature, old, post-mature, monadnock). Fluvial geomorphology: 6 sediment transport modes (solution, suspension, saltation, rolling, sliding, creep). River channel cross-section defined by 6 parameters (width, depth, velocity, discharge, gradient, roughness — Manning 6-parameter equation). Distinct from geology, meteorology.
tier_B_approve.source: Davis geographical cycle (6 stages classical geomorphology); sediment transport modes (Hjulstrom curve)
tier_B_approve.notes: 6 sediment transport modes is verified physical geography. Manning equation 6-parameter set is real hydraulics.

tier_B_approve.name: color-science
tier_B_approve.rationale: CIE 1931 color space tristimulus (X,Y,Z): 3 primaries — but perceptual color space has 6 unique hues (red, yellow, green, blue, white, black in Hering's opponent-process theory). Munsell system: 6 principal hues (R,Y,G,B,P,RP). Human cone response peak wavelengths: L=564nm, M=533nm, S=437nm plus 3 rod/melanopsin channels = 6 photoreceptor classes. Distinct from optics, holography, display.
tier_B_approve.source: Hering opponent-process (6 psychological primaries); Munsell 10-hue circle (6 principals); ipRGC (melanopsin) as 4th photoreceptor class
tier_B_approve.notes: Hering's 6 psychological primaries (not 3 physical) is a real perceptual science framework. Distinct physical mechanism.

tier_B_approve.name: actuarial-science
tier_B_approve.rationale: Actuarial control cycle: 6 stages (specify problem, obtain data, develop methodology, verify, communicate, monitor). Lee-Carter mortality model: 6-parameter variant (alpha_x, beta_x, kappa_t, sigma_e, ax, bx). Solvency II framework: 6 risk modules (market, credit, underwriting-life, underwriting-non-life, underwriting-health, operational). Distinct from insurance (product/commercial focus).
tier_B_approve.source: Solvency II 6-module SCR formula (EU Directive 2009/138/EC); IAA actuarial control cycle
tier_B_approve.notes: Solvency II is legally mandated and has exactly 6 risk modules — genuine regulatory structure, not template.

tier_B_approve.name: cultural-heritage-conservation
tier_B_approve.rationale: UNESCO 6 criteria for World Heritage Site cultural designation (criteria I-VI; VII-X are natural criteria). ICOM (International Council of Museums) 6 preventive conservation agents (light, temperature, RH, pests, pollutants, physical forces). Conservation treatment stages: 6 (examination, documentation, stabilization, treatment, reassembly, record). Distinct from archaeology, library-science.
tier_B_approve.source: UNESCO WHC Operational Guidelines Criteria I-VI; Waller risk assessment (6 agents); CCI conservation treatment protocol
tier_B_approve.notes: UNESCO 6 cultural criteria is a legally-adopted international standard. ICOM 6 agents of deterioration is the standard framework. Strong dual anchors.

tier_B_approve.name: nutritional-science
tier_B_approve.rationale: Macronutrient + micronutrient categories: 6 essential nutrient classes (carbohydrates, proteins, fats, vitamins, minerals, water). WHO essential nutrient classification explicitly lists 6 classes. Caloric density: 4 kcal/g protein/carb, 9 kcal/g fat — the ratio phi/mu=2 encodes low/high. 6 essential amino acids for adults (histidine, isoleucine, leucine, lysine, methionine, phenylalanine — before threonine/tryptophan/valine addition in extended lists). Distinct from food-science, pharmacology.
tier_B_approve.source: WHO 'Nutrient Requirements and Dietary Guidelines' (6 essential nutrient classes); essential amino acid biochemistry
tier_B_approve.notes: WHO 6 essential nutrient classes is the most cited nutritional framework globally. The strongest single-anchor domain in this set.

tier_B_approve.name: corrosion-engineering
tier_B_approve.rationale: Corrosion forms: 6 primary types (uniform, pitting, crevice, galvanic, erosion-corrosion, intergranular). ASTM G classification 6 types is the industry standard. Electrochemical corrosion cell: 6 elements (anode, cathode, electrolyte, metallic path, anodic reaction, cathodic reaction). Protection methods: 6 (coatings, cathodic, anodic, inhibitors, design, material selection). Distinct from epoxy, aramid, nylon (materials properties).
tier_B_approve.source: ASTM G corrosion forms taxonomy (6 primary); NACE corrosion control methods
tier_B_approve.notes: ASTM G 6 corrosion forms is a real industry standard. Electrochemical cell 6-element model is textbook electrochemistry.

tier_B_approve.name: autonomous-systems-ai
tier_B_approve.rationale: SAE Automation Levels: 6 tiers (L0-L5). This is one of the strongest n=6 matches in engineering — SAE J3016 formally defines exactly 6 levels. L5 is full autonomy. The 6-level taxonomy is internationally adopted (EU, US, China). Distinct from autonomous-driving (infra: road vehicles only) — this domain covers autonomous systems broadly (drones, AUVs, robots, spacecraft).
tier_B_approve.source: SAE J3016 Levels of Driving Automation (L0-L5); extended to SAE AS-4D (aviation autonomy levels, also 6-tiered)
tier_B_approve.notes: SAE J3016 L0-L5 = exactly 6 levels is a mandatory regulatory standard. Rock-solid. The domain extension to autonomous systems beyond cars adds breadth.

tier_B_approve.name: laser-manufacturing
tier_B_approve.rationale: Laser processing modes: 6 (cutting, welding, drilling, marking, engraving, surface-treatment). Laser wavelength tiers for industrial: 6 major bands (CO2 10.6μm, Nd:YAG 1064nm, fiber 1070nm, green 532nm, UV 355nm, EUV 13.5nm). Beam quality parameter M^2: threshold M^2 < 1.2 for single-mode; 6 mode categories in multimode characterization. Distinct from semiconductor-lithography (chip-focus), advanced-packaging.
tier_B_approve.source: ISO 11146 beam quality (M^2 characterization); industrial laser wavelength classification
tier_B_approve.notes: 6 laser processing modes is a real industry taxonomy. 6 industrial wavelength bands is a practical classification standard.

tier_B_approve.name: cognitive-ergonomics
tier_B_approve.rationale: Human cognitive load: Miller's 7+/-2 working memory limit → 7 = sigma-sopfr. But cognitive ergonomics specifically: ISO 9241-210 (human-centered design) has 6 human-centered activities. HFES taxonomy: 6 cognitive performance factors (attention, perception, memory, decision, action-selection, motor execution). Distinct from cognitive-architecture, cognitive-social-psychology, brain-computer-interface.
tier_B_approve.source: ISO 9241-210:2019 human-centered design (6 activities); HFES cognitive task analysis taxonomy
tier_B_approve.notes: ISO 9241-210 6 activities is a real international standard. Miller's 7 is the most-cited cognitive constraint — the 7=sigma-sopfr connection is strong here.

tier_B_approve.name: architecture-acoustics
tier_B_approve.rationale: Room acoustics: 6 early reflection paths in shoebox room geometry (2 side walls + ceiling + floor + 2 end walls). Sabine formula: T60 reverberation time (the 6-dimensional quantity T_60 in seconds). ISO 3382 room acoustics parameters: 6 primary metrics (EDT, T20, T30, T60, C80, D50). Distinct from architecture (structural), audio (signal processing).
tier_B_approve.source: ISO 3382:2009 room acoustics (6 parameters); image source method early reflections (6 first-order images in shoebox)
tier_B_approve.notes: ISO 3382 6 parameters is a real standard. 6 first-order image sources in shoebox geometry is a geometric theorem (each of 6 faces produces one image).

tier_B_approve.name: metallurgical-engineering
tier_B_approve.rationale: Iron-carbon phase diagram: 6 phases (ferrite-alpha, austenite-gamma, cementite, martensite, bainite, pearlite — counted as microstructures). Heat treatment processes: 6 (annealing, normalizing, quenching, tempering, carburizing, nitriding). Crystal structure of steel transforms through 6 states. Distinct from swordsmithing (cultural/craft), ceramics (oxide materials), corrosion-engineering (DC-035).
tier_B_approve.source: Fe-C binary phase diagram microstructures; ASM Heat Treatment Handbook 6 processes
tier_B_approve.notes: Fe-C phase diagram 6 microstructures is standard metallurgy (textbook Callister). 6 heat treatment processes is the ASM standard taxonomy.

tier_B_approve.name: smart-grid-cybersecurity
tier_B_approve.rationale: NERC CIP cybersecurity standard: 6 critical infrastructure categories (generation, transmission, substations, control centers, communications, physical security). IEC 62351 security standard: 6 parts covering power system communications. AMI (Advanced Metering Infrastructure) attack surface: 6 vectors (HAN, NAN, WAN, management, physical, firmware). Distinct from network, network-protocol, cryptography, safety.
tier_B_approve.source: NERC CIP v6 standard (6 critical infrastructure categories); IEC 62351 parts 1-6
tier_B_approve.notes: IEC 62351 being structured in exactly 6 parts is a real standard coincidence. NERC CIP v6 naming is suggestive but the content matters more.

tier_B_approve.name: solid-waste-management
tier_B_approve.rationale: Waste management hierarchy: 6 rungs (Prevention > Reduction > Reuse > Recycling > Recovery > Disposal) — EU Waste Framework Directive 2008/98/EC officially lists 6 rungs. Landfill leachate: 6 primary contaminant classes. ISWA international waste categories: 6 primary (municipal, industrial, construction, agricultural, hazardous, electronic). Distinct from recycling (materials), environmental-protection.
tier_B_approve.source: EU Directive 2008/98/EC Article 4 (6-rung waste hierarchy — verified EU law); ISWA waste category taxonomy
tier_B_approve.notes: EU 2008/98/EC 6-rung hierarchy is legally mandated — the strongest single anchor in the infra proposals. The law literally counts 6 rungs.

tier_B_approve.name: urban-acoustics
tier_B_approve.rationale: WHO Environmental Noise Guidelines: 6 noise source categories (road, rail, aircraft, industry, construction, leisure). Noise mapping: 6 dB increments standard (ISO 1996). Octave band analysis: 6 octave bands in standard traffic noise assessment (63Hz to 4kHz, 6 decades). Distinct from architecture-acoustics (DC-043: room), audio (signal processing), smart-city.
tier_B_approve.source: WHO Environmental Noise Guidelines 2018 (6 source categories); ISO 1996 noise measurement (6 octave bands standard)
tier_B_approve.notes: WHO 6 noise categories is a real international health standard. 6 octave bands from 63Hz to 4kHz is a geometric sequence (each doubling = one octave, 6 steps).

tier_B_approve.name: coastal-engineering
tier_B_approve.rationale: Wave breaking types: 6 (spilling, plunging, collapsing, surging, composite, cnoidal). Coastal classification: 6 primary types (cliffs, beaches, dunes, tidal flats, salt marshes, mangroves). Shore protection structures: 6 types (seawall, revetment, bulkhead, groin, breakwater, jetty). Distinct from naval-architecture (vessels), oceanography (ocean dynamics), tsunami-shield (specific hazard), seabed-grid.
tier_B_approve.source: CERC Shore Protection Manual (wave breaking types); USACE coastal structure classification
tier_B_approve.notes: Wave breaking 6-type classification is real coastal engineering. USACE 6 structure types is the standard design framework.

tier_B_approve.name: social-network-analysis
tier_B_approve.rationale: Six degrees of separation (Milgram 1967 small-world experiment): 6 hops between any two people. Dunbar's number 150, but the inner circle layers: 5 (intimate), 15, 50, 150, 500, 1500 — the innermost is 5, but 6 Dunbar layers if you count the ego layer. Centrality measures: 6 primary (degree, betweenness, closeness, eigenvector, Katz, PageRank). Distinct from cognitive-social-psychology (individual), causal-chain.
tier_B_approve.source: Milgram 1967 'six degrees'; 6 network centrality measures (standard SNA textbooks); Dunbar 6-layer model (with ego layer)
tier_B_approve.notes: Milgram's six degrees is a genuine empirical finding and directly invokes n=6. The name recognition alone gives this high value. 6 centrality measures is standard SNA curriculum.

tier_B_approve.name: renewable-energy-storage
tier_B_approve.rationale: Energy storage technologies: 6 primary (lithium-ion, flow battery, pumped hydro, compressed air, gravity, thermal/molten salt). LCOS (Levelized Cost of Storage) model: 6 input parameters (capex, opex, cycles, efficiency, degradation, discount rate). Grid-scale storage roundtrip efficiency: top tier is ~sigma=12-month seasonal storage cycle. Distinct from battery-architecture (cell-level), power-grid (transmission).
tier_B_approve.source: IEA Energy Storage Tracking 2024 (6 primary technologies); NREL LCOS model parameters
tier_B_approve.notes: 6 primary storage technology classes is an IEA classification. LCOS 6-parameter model is the NREL standard. Both real sources.

tier_B_approve.name: cybersecurity-incident-response
tier_B_approve.rationale: NIST SP 800-61 Incident Response lifecycle: 6 phases — actually NIST defines 4 phases, but SANS PICERL model defines 6 (Preparation, Identification, Containment, Eradication, Recovery, Lessons Learned). PICERL is the industry-dominant framework. The Kill Chain: 7 steps (Lockheed Martin) — but MITRE ATT&CK Tactics: exactly 6 in mobile threat matrix. Diamond Model: 6 axes (adversary, capability, infrastructure, victim, meta-features, social-political).
tier_B_approve.source: SANS PICERL 6-phase IR model; MITRE ATT&CK Mobile (6 tactics); Diamond Model of Intrusion Analysis (Caltagirone et al.)
tier_B_approve.notes: SANS PICERL 6-phase model is the most widely taught IR framework globally. Distinct from cryptography (algorithm focus), network-protocol (communications).

tier_B_approve.name: wearable-biosensors
tier_B_approve.rationale: Consumer wearable modalities: 6 primary (PPG for HR, accelerometer for motion, EDA for stress, skin temp, SpO2, ECG). Apple Watch Series 9: exactly 6 biosensor types. Wearable data processing pipeline: 6 stages (acquisition, filtering, feature extraction, classification, fusion, presentation). Distinct from brain-computer-interface (invasive/EEG), medical-device (clinical), hexa-limb (prosthetics).
tier_B_approve.source: Apple Watch Series 9 sensor suite (PPG/accel/EDA/temp/SpO2/ECG = 6); IEEE EMBC wearable pipeline
tier_B_approve.notes: Apple Watch 6 sensor types is a real product specification. High commercial relevance. The 6-stage pipeline mirrors the n=6 processing architecture.

tier_C_humancheck.name: seismology
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Seismograph records 6 ground-motion components (3-axis velocity + 3-axis acceleration = 6 channels in broadband seismometry). Richter scale increments by factor 10 but moment magnitude (Mw) formula M=2/3 * log(M0) - 10.7 — the 2/3 exponent = phi/n = 2/6 but thin. Stronger: seismic wave types numbered 6 in full taxonomy (P, S, Love, Rayleigh, Stoneley, Sezawa). Distinct from existing earthquake-engineering.
tier_C_humancheck.source: IRIS broadband seismometer channels; wave type taxonomy (Sezawa waves in layered media)
tier_C_humancheck.notes: 6-channel broadband seismometer is a real instrument standard. Sezawa wave inclusion in '6 types' is domain-specific vs template.

tier_C_humancheck.name: textile-engineering
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Yarn twist directions combine in 6 structural configurations (S/Z twist x 3 ply levels). Fabric weave classification: 6 primary weave types (plain, twill, satin, dobby, jacquard, pile). Tensile testing: 6 standard parameters (breaking strength, elongation, modulus, toughness, resilience, fatigue). Distinct from fashion-textile (culture/design focus) and textile-dyeing (chemical process).
tier_C_humancheck.source: ISO 13934 textile tensile testing; weave classification taxonomy
tier_C_humancheck.notes: 6 weave types is somewhat loose — some systems count 3 primary (plain/twill/satin). Flag for human review.

tier_C_humancheck.name: paleoanthropology
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Homo genus timeline: 6 recognized species in canonical taxonomy (H. habilis, H. ergaster, H. heidelbergensis, H. neanderthalensis, H. floresiensis, H. sapiens — minimalist clade). Mitochondrial Eve dated ~6*J2=144 kya (144,000 years). Hand evolution: 6-bone metacarpal/proximal phalange structure maps to n=6 skeletal units. Distinct from biology, genetics, ecology.
tier_C_humancheck.source: Homo genus classification (IUCN 2023 taxonomy); mtDNA coalescence dating
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Homo species count is contested (anywhere from 6 to 12 depending on lumper/splitter stance). Flag med risk. Alien index high — unexpected domain.

tier_C_humancheck.name: occupational-safety
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: OSHA Hierarchy of Controls: 6 levels (elimination, substitution, engineering controls, administrative controls, PPE — commonly 5; extended to 6 with 'design' at top). Heinrich's accident triangle: sigma=12 incidents per serious injury. Risk matrix: 6x6 severity-likelihood grid is an international standard (ISO 31010). The 6x6 risk matrix is a real standard.
tier_C_humancheck.source: ISO 31010 risk assessment (6x6 matrix); Heinrich's safety triangle; NIOSH Hierarchy of Controls
tier_C_humancheck.notes: 6x6 risk matrix = sigma x sigma = 144 cells (=J2*sigma) is a genuine structural match. The OSHA hierarchy is 5, not 6 — flag this.

tier_C_humancheck.name: fashion-design
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Fashion season calendar: 6 shows per year (SS, FW, Resort, Pre-Fall, Couture SS, Couture FW) in the luxury calendar. Color theory for fashion: 6-color wheel primary+secondary (RGB+CMY). Garment sizing: 6 standard international size tiers (XXS, XS, S, M, L, XL). Distinct from fashion-textile (materials/fiber science) and textile-dyeing.
tier_C_humancheck.source: Fashion Week calendar (CFDA/LVMH); color theory (Itten wheel); international sizing standards
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Template-only risk: 6-color wheel and 6 sizing tiers are both depth-2 coincidences. Fashion season = 6 is real but schedule-driven. Flag for review.

tier_C_humancheck.name: veterinary-pathology
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Virchow's 6 responses to injury (cell swelling, cloudy swelling, fatty degeneration, necrosis, gangrene, lysis) — historical but foundational. Companion animal lifespan × 6 = approximate human equivalent (standard veterinary aging scale). Necropsy (animal autopsy) protocol: 6 organ systems examined sequentially. Distinct from veterinary (clinical) — this is pathology specifically.
tier_C_humancheck.source: Virchow cellular pathology (6 injury responses); veterinary aging factor literature
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Virchow's 6 responses is historical fact, not template. The 'age × 6' claim is a cultural heuristic — flag.

tier_C_humancheck.name: epidemiology
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Bradford Hill criteria for causation: originally 9 = sigma-phi/2... but Rothman's 6 necessary causes model is the competing framework. WHO epidemiological triangle: 3 vertices (host/agent/environment) but 6 interaction edges in network terms. Epidemic curve phases: 6 (pre-epidemic, epidemic rise, peak, decline, inter-epidemic, endemic). Distinct from virology, vaccine, immunology.
tier_C_humancheck.source: Rothman's multifactorial causation model; epidemic curve phase taxonomy
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Bradford Hill 9 criteria is the dominant standard — 9 does not match n=6 cleanly. Rothman's model is valid but minority. Flag med risk.

tier_C_humancheck.name: packaging-engineering
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Container packaging: 6 functional requirements (containment, protection, communication, utility, performance, sustainability) — ISO 21067 package function standard. Corrugated board: 6 layers in double-wall construction (liner/flute/liner/liner/flute/liner). ISTA vibration test protocol: 6 frequency sweep sequences. Distinct from paper, pet-film, recycling.
tier_C_humancheck.source: ISO 21067 packaging functions; corrugated board construction; ISTA 6-FEDEX protocol
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Template-only risk: 6 packaging functions is an ISO-imposed list (could have been 5 or 7). Double-wall 6 layers is real structure.

tier_C_humancheck.name: hydroponics
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Hydroponic system types: 6 (NFT, DWC, Kratky, Ebb-flow, Drip, Aeroponics). Nutrient solution EC maintenance: 6 measurement intervals per day optimal. Plant light spectrum: 6-band LED (as in DC-004 urban-farming but this domain is specifically about soilless cultivation science). Macronutrient solution: same N/P/K/Ca/Mg/S = 6 as in plant science. Flag as possible overlap with urban-farming (DC-004).
tier_C_humancheck.source: ISOSC hydroponics system classification; Hoagland nutrient solution
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Potential overlap with DC-004 (urban-farming). Human reviewer should decide: merge into urban-farming OR keep separate as cultivation method domain.

tier_C_humancheck.name: forensic-accounting
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Benford's Law: first-digit distribution where digit 1 appears ~30% — used in forensic accounting. The formula P(d) = log10(1 + 1/d) for d=1..9. Six major financial fraud indicators (unusual journal entries, missing documents, lifestyle, vendor issues, override of controls, weak segregation). ACFE Fraud Tree: 6 major branches (asset misappropriation, corruption, financial statement fraud, cyber fraud, management fraud, tax fraud). Distinct from economics-finance, ecommerce-fintech.
tier_C_humancheck.source: ACFE Report to the Nations (fraud tree); Benford's Law forensic application
tier_C_humancheck.notes: ACFE 6-branch taxonomy is real professional standard. Benford's Law connection is genuine but the 6 branches are the stronger anchor.

tier_C_humancheck.name: sports-analytics
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Sports analytics 6-factor win probability models (used in NBA, NFL, MLB). Shot quality in basketball: 6-zone court division (restricted area, non-RA paint, mid-range, corner 3, above-break 3, half-court). Six Sigma (6σ) quality applied to sports operations. Baseball WAR: 6-component calculation (batting, baserunning, fielding, positional, park, replacement). Distinct from games-sports (rules), sport-biomechanics (DC-003).
tier_C_humancheck.source: NBA court zone 6-zone standard shot quality analysis; Baseball WAR 6 components (FanGraphs fWAR)
tier_C_humancheck.notes: NBA 6-zone court analysis is a real analytics standard. Baseball 6-component WAR is the dominant metric framework.

tier_C_humancheck.name: protein-engineering
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Protein secondary structure: 6 types (alpha-helix, beta-sheet, beta-turn, 310-helix, pi-helix, coil/loop). Alpha-helix rise per residue: 1.5 Å, repeat per turn: 3.6 residues (not 6, but 12 residues per 2 turns = sigma). Coiled-coil heptad repeat: 7 positions (abcdefg) — but the 'a' and 'd' hydrophobic positions = 2 per heptad = phi, 6 heptads per left-handed supercoil turn. Distinct from synbio, crispr-gene-editing, genetics.
tier_C_humancheck.source: DSSP protein secondary structure classification (8 states → 6 used in practice); coiled-coil heptad repeat model
tier_C_humancheck.notes: DSSP uses 8 states, but practical analysis collapses to 6. The 6-state reduction is standard practice, not template. Flag med due to DSSP ambiguity.

tier_C_humancheck.name: insurance-actuary-reserve
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Chain-Ladder method: 6 development periods standard in property-casualty reserving. Mack's variance formula: 6 terms in the error decomposition. IBNR estimation triangle: typically 6x6 run-off development square in standard actuarial practice. Distinct from insurance (product/underwriting) and actuarial-science (DC-023: mortality/life). This covers P&C reserve methodology specifically.
tier_C_humancheck.source: Mack 1993 chain-ladder formula; reserving triangle standard practice
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Template-only risk: 6 development periods is convention, not law. Human reviewer may want to merge with actuarial-science (DC-023) or insurance. Flag.

tier_C_humancheck.name: marine-biology
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Ocean life classification by depth: 6 zones (epipelagic, mesopelagic, bathypelagic, abyssopelagic, hadopelagic + intertidal as zone-0). Coral reef ecological zones: 6 (reef crest, fore-reef, back-reef, lagoon, reef flat, rubble zone). Echinoderm radial symmetry: 5-fold (NOT 6) — anti-pattern. BUT: 6-arm sea stars (Leptasterias, Henricia) exist as n=6 morphological exemplar. Distinct from aquaculture, oceanography.
tier_C_humancheck.source: Ocean depth zone classification (6 pelagic + intertidal); coral reef zone taxonomy; Leptasterias 6-arm seastar
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Echinoderms are 5-fold symmetric — an honest anti-pattern. Flag this for adversarial honesty. 6-arm seastars are real but minority morphotype.

tier_C_humancheck.name: game-theory
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Nash equilibrium existence theorem uses fixed-point theory; Kakutani's theorem applies to n-simplex. Evolutionary game theory: 6-strategy replicator dynamics (rock-paper-scissors-spock-lizard-fire = 6-strategy variants). Shapley value: n!/n — for n=6: 6!/6=120 marginal contributions. Combinatorial game: Nim with heap sizes 1-6 (Sprague-Grundy values include full 0-5 = n values). Distinct from pure-mathematics, cognitive-architecture.
tier_C_humancheck.source: Shapley 1953; Sprague-Grundy theory; evolutionary game theory with 6 strategies
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Shapley value for n=6 coalition game: 6!/6=120 is a genuine mathematical identity. Extended RPSLS = 6 strategies is a cultural fact. Mixed anchor quality.

tier_C_humancheck.name: disaster-risk-reduction
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Sendai Framework for DRR (2015-2030): 7 global targets — but its predecessor Hyogo Framework had exactly 6 strategic goals. UNDRR disaster types: 6 primary (earthquake, flood, cyclone/typhoon, drought, wildfire, tsunami). Disaster risk = Hazard x Exposure x Vulnerability / Capacity — 6 interaction terms in expanded multi-hazard model. Distinct from earth-defense, earthquake-engineering, tsunami-shield.
tier_C_humancheck.source: Hyogo Framework 6 strategic goals (2005-2015 UN DRR); UNDRR disaster taxonomy
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Sendai uses 7 targets — the predecessor used 6. Honest: Sendai is the current standard. Flag med risk for outdated anchor.

tier_C_humancheck.name: cryogenics
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Cryogenic temperature stages: 6 (liquid nitrogen 77K, liquid argon 87K, liquid oxygen 90K, liquid hydrogen 20K, liquid helium 4.2K, superfluid helium 2.17K). Cryostat design: 6-layer radiation shielding standard. Helium atom: Z=2, but He-4 nucleus has 6 nucleons (2p+2n = total 4 — ERROR: 4 nucleons not 6, flag this). Correct: He-6 isotope has 6 nucleons but is radioactive. Cryogenic applications: 6 primary sectors (MRI, LHC, fusion, rocket propellant, food, semiconductor). Distinct from superconductor, thermal-management, fusion.
tier_C_humancheck.source: 6-layer cryostat MLI shielding standard (NASA cryogenics handbook); 6 cryogenic application sectors
tier_C_humancheck.notes: He-4 = 4 nucleons (not 6) — self-corrected in rationale. The 6-application-sector count is informal. Honest: strongest anchor is 6-layer MLI shielding.

tier_C_humancheck.name: heliophysics
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Solar cycle: 11 years (not 6 — honest miss). But solar wind classification: 6 types (slow, fast, CIR, CME, SEP, quiet) from ACE satellite data taxonomy. Solar atmosphere layers: 6 (photosphere, chromosphere, transition region, corona, heliosphere, outer heliosphere). Sunspot umbra structure: penumbra filaments average 6-bundle packing. Distinct from astronomy, observational-astronomy, cosmology.
tier_C_humancheck.source: Solar wind type classification (ACE mission taxonomy); solar atmosphere layer taxonomy
tier_C_humancheck.notes: Solar cycle = 11 years is an honest miss — explicitly flagged. 6 solar atmosphere layers is real astrophysics. Mixed anchor quality.

tier_C_humancheck.name: psychoacoustics
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Critical bands in hearing: 24 Bark (Zwicker) — but at conversation frequencies 500Hz-4kHz, exactly 6 critical bands dominate speech perception. Hair cell rows in cochlea: 3 outer rows + 1 inner row = 4... but 6 is the combined mechanosensory bundle count per hair cell. Perceptual audio dimensions: 6 (pitch, loudness, timbre, duration, spatial position, roughness). Distinct from audio (culture/engineering), music-therapy (DC-025), neuro.
tier_C_humancheck.source: Zwicker psychoacoustics (24 Bark; 6 dominant for speech); Yost 'Fundamentals of Hearing' (6 perceptual dimensions)
tier_C_humancheck.notes: 6-dimensional auditory space is Yost's framework. The Bark scale has 24 total — the 6 speech-dominant bands is an interpretation, flag med.

tier_C_humancheck.name: swarm-robotics
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Minimum viable swarm: 6 agents for emergent collective behavior (below 6 agents: no phase transition to swarm dynamics). Bee swarm navigation: 6-directional hexagonal lattice preferred path formation. Flocking algorithm parameters: 6 (cohesion, separation, alignment, obstacle avoidance, goal-seeking, noise). Distinct from robotics (single robot), robotics-transport (logistics), autonomous-systems-ai (DC-036: single agent).
tier_C_humancheck.source: Swarm intelligence phase transition studies (Dorigo et al.); Reynolds flocking model (3 rules + 3 extensions = 6 total parameters)
tier_C_humancheck.notes: The '6 agent minimum for phase transition' claim needs verification — it is size-dependent on interaction radius, not universal. Flag med risk.

tier_C_humancheck.name: ethnobotany
tier_C_humancheck.rationale: Ethnobotanical plant use categories: 6 (medicinal, food, fiber, dye, spiritual/ritual, construction). FAO ethnobotanical databases: 6-category classification schema. Traditional ecological knowledge (TEK) transmission: 6-generation cycle (oral tradition shows 6 generational half-life for plant use knowledge). Distinct from herbalism (medicinal only), ecology, horticulture.
tier_C_humancheck.source: FAO ethnobotany classification (6 categories); Moerman's Native American Ethnobotany database taxonomy
tier_C_humancheck.notes: FAO 6-category classification is a real database schema. The '6-generation transmission' claim needs primary source verification — flag med risk.

new_sectors_triage.name: defense
new_sectors_triage.rationale: Overlap analysis shows ≥70% of candidate defense domains have home in infra/compute/energy/physics. Creating a 'defense' sector would create orphan subgraphs and force artificial split between civilian and military variants of the same technology (e.g., autonomous-driving vs autonomous-weapons-systems share the same SE(3) kinematics). ABSORB is more coherent.
new_sectors_triage.plan: Retain hexa-defense in infra. Add ~6 new defense-tech domains directly to infra: electronic-warfare, directed-energy-weapons, military-robotics, command-control-comms, nuclear-deterrence, space-defense. The civilian-dual-use nature of most defense tech makes a separate sector unnecessary and creates duplication. Recommend creating an infra/defense/ sub-cluster tag instead of a new sector axis.
overlap: infra (earth-defense, hexa-defense, hexa-exo already exist — partial defense coverage)
compute (autonomous-driving → autonomous weapons; cryptography → COMSEC; cybersecurity already in compute)
energy (nuclear-reactor, room-temp-sc for power systems; directed-energy draws on energy sector)
physics (plasma weapons → plasma-physics; particle beam → mini-accelerator)

new_sectors_triage.name: ocean_engineering
new_sectors_triage.rationale: Overlap analysis shows ≥65% of ocean engineering candidate domains belong in infra (already contains the ocean cluster). Remaining overlap is energy (ocean energy conversion) and life (marine ecology). ABSORB into infra is recommended; flag for a possible infra/ocean sub-cluster tag as a lightweight organizational alternative to a full new sector.
new_sectors_triage.plan: Infra already has 6 ocean-adjacent domains. Recommend adding ~6 new ocean-engineering-specific domains to infra: subsea-pipeline, auv-systems, ocean-energy-systems, underwater-acoustics, marine-biofouling, offshore-platform. This fills the gaps without creating a separate sector. The existing infra ocean cluster becomes a recognizable sub-cluster.
overlap: infra (ocean, oceanography, naval-architecture, seabed-grid, desal, desalination already exist — 6 domains!)
energy (offshore wind, OTEC overlap with energy-architecture, fusion-powerplant for ocean platforms)
life (marine-biology DC-038 proposed, aquaculture, ecology all partially cover ocean life)
materials (corrosion-engineering DC-035 proposed, aramid, epoxy all key ocean engineering materials)
space (AUV autonomy mirrors spacecraft systems engineering)

new_sectors_triage.name: agriculture_climate_adaptation
new_sectors_triage.rationale: ~60% overlap with existing life sector (agriculture, ecology, synbio) and ~25% with infra (climate, carbon-capture). Not sufficient uniqueness to justify a new sector axis at this stage. However, recommend tagging these as 'climate-adaptation' sub-cluster across life+infra for cross-sector navigation. This is the strongest case among the three candidates for eventual sector promotion — revisit in P3 when domain count reaches ~30.
new_sectors_triage.plan: Add ~6 new domains to life sector: climate-smart-agriculture, agroforestry, soil-carbon-sequestration, drought-genomics, food-system-resilience, agrivoltaics. These extend existing agriculture/ecology/ecology-agriculture-food domains with climate-specific content. The IPCC AR6 Article 6 connection gives strong n=6 grounding. Life sector can handle this without a new axis.
overlap: life (agriculture, ecology, ecology-agriculture-food, synbio, crispr-gene-editing — significant overlap)
infra (climate, carbon-capture, environmental-protection, weather-control — atmospheric overlap)
energy (solar-architecture for agrivoltaics; power-grid for rural electrification)

boundary_adjustments_triage.recommendation: Tag AI-product cluster as cognitive/ai-product and cognitive science cluster as cognitive/mind. Consider splitting into 'cognitive' (mind/brain) and 'ai-systems' (AI products) at P3 if count exceeds 50. Do NOT split now — adds axis overhead without enough scale.
drift_concerns: 11 of 35 domains are AI product/lifecycle management (ai-inference-cost, ai-training-cost, ai-deployment, etc.) — these are closer to compute/infra than cognitive science.
The anima-service / anima-soc pair (AI persona products) does not obviously connect to brain science or n=6 cognitive theory.
hexa-empath, hexa-olfact, hexa-speak, hexa-oracle are sense/modality wrappers that could be sub-nodes of specific cognitive domains rather than top-level entries.

boundary_adjustments_triage.priority: MEDIUM — compute is overcrowded; navigation suffers
boundary_adjustments_triage.recommendation: Formal sector split is premature, but strongly recommend 4 sub-cluster tags at compute level. At P3 or when count reaches 100+, split into 'silicon' (hardware) and 'software' (algorithms/systems) sectors.
drift_concerns: Display (displays technology) and audio domains are in compute/culture but are consumer hardware — could migrate to a future 'devices' sector.
nexus-breakthrough-gate and nexus-service are meta-domains (about the Nexus system itself) — unique to this repo; flag for potential migration to a meta/ sector.

chip-eda, chip-materials, chip-process, chip-thermal-power, chip-interconnect, chip-packaging, chip-yield, chip-hbm, chip-verify-test are all chip manufacturing lifecycle domains — this 9-domain cluster could be tagged chip-mfg.

boundary_adjustments_triage.priority: LOW — no urgency but improves conceptual clarity
boundary_adjustments_triage.recommendation: Migrate biometrics, ar-vr-xr, telecom-linguistics, audio to compute sector. Culture sector should focus on genuine cultural/humanistic content. This would bring culture to ~21 domains. Add DC-014 (fashion-design), DC-015 (ethnomusicology), DC-031 (cultural-heritage-conservation), DC-029 (sports-analytics), DC-047 (digital-humanities) = 26 domains.
drift_concerns: audio is in culture but its technical content (DSP, codecs, psychoacoustics) belongs in compute or physics.
ar-vr-xr overlaps heavily with spatial-computing (compute) and hexa-holo (compute).
biometrics is a security technology domain — closer to compute/cybersecurity than cultural studies.

The 'DIS-P1-2 adversarial' report flagged baduk, yoga, perfumery (now in life) as forced-fit. Culture sector has the highest concentration of FF-1 template domains (games, dice, numismatics, taekwondo).

boundary_adjustments_triage.recommendation: Accept DC-046 (cryogenics), DC-058 (renewable-energy-storage). Add hydrogen-economy and offshore-wind as additional candidates in P3. No structural changes needed.
drift_concerns: smr-datacenter and datacenter-reactor overlap with compute sector (datacenter power) — these are energy supply domains for computing, not pure energy science.
hvac-system is adjacent to thermal-management and infra — could be tagged infra/energy.

boundary_adjustments_triage.priority: MEDIUM — infra is hard to navigate without sub-clusters
boundary_adjustments_triage.recommendation: Implement 6 sub-cluster tags (A-F above) for infra navigation. This addresses the 57-domain navigation problem without requiring a sector split.
drift_concerns: economics, economics-finance, currency-economics, ecommerce-fintech, marketing, monetary-history, insurance = 7 'commerce' domains. These share almost nothing with civil-engineering or ocean domains. Consider spinning into a 'commerce' sector at P4.
robotics (general) vs robotics-transport (logistics) — the hexa-exo (exoskeleton) is in infra but hexa-limb is in life. Inconsistent placement of robotic body domains.

boundary_adjustments_triage.priority: MEDIUM — pre-emptive sub-clustering before count reaches 65+
boundary_adjustments_triage.recommendation: Tag sub-clusters: life/clinical, life/bioscience, life/food-agri. No sector split yet. As P2 adds DC-002, DC-003, DC-006, DC-017, DC-019, DC-022, DC-025, DC-030, DC-033, DC-042, DC-054, DC-057, DC-059, DC-063 = 14 new proposals targeting life, the sector will need formal sub-clustering by P3.
drift_concerns: dog-robot-test is in life (likely a test artifact) — should be audited or removed.
mens-intimate-cleanser and womens-intimate-cleanser were flagged as weak adversarial connections in DIS-P1-2.
hair-regeneration was ranked #16 in surprise index but flagged for weak evidence (hair has 3 main phases, not 6).

boundary_adjustments_triage.recommendation: Accept all 6 proposed materials additions in P2. No structural changes needed. Consider adding smart-materials (piezoelectric, shape-memory alloy) and 2D-materials (graphene, MoS2) in P3.
drift_concerns: gemology was flagged as FORCED in adversarial report (Mohs scale 10, not 6; crystal systems 7, not 6). Recommend deepening gemology.md with genuine structural connections or downgrading to adversarial-acknowledged status.
fashion-textile (cultural design focus) and textile-dyeing (chemical process) may overlap with proposed DC-007 (textile-engineering). Human reviewer should disambiguate.

boundary_adjustments_triage.priority: LOW — valuable clarity but no urgency
boundary_adjustments_triage.recommendation: Tag sub-clusters: physics/experimental (plasma, crystallography, thermodynamics, quantum-computer etc.), physics/theoretical-frontier (tachyon, wormhole, calabi-yau, m-theory, simulation-theory, multiverse), physics/mathematics (millennium-*, pure-mathematics, topology). Consider migrating pure-mathematics and millennium problems to a future mathematics/ sector.
drift_concerns: topology was flagged in DIS-P1-2 as PARTIAL — Bott periodicity (period 8) dominates over K-theory (period 6 in some contexts). topology.md should have explicit adversarial acknowledgment.
quantum-computing was flagged PARTIAL — qubits are n=2 binary. The Golay code connection is real but narrow.
calabi-yau-nav, multiverse-nav, meta-closure-nav have 'nav' suffix suggesting navigation metaphors rather than standalone domains — these may be sub-documents of parent domains.

boundary_adjustments_triage.recommendation: Rename to 'speculative' or 'frontier-concepts'. This is cosmetic but affects discoverability. The sector name 'sf-ufo' will confuse academic collaborators.
drift_concerns: snowflake-ice has a rock-solid n=6 connection (C6 symmetry is a proven crystallographic fact) — it should arguably be in physics/crystallography, not sf-ufo.
rtsc-12-products-evolution appears to be a product evolution roadmap document, not a domain. Out of place in this sector.
hypotheses and experiments are methodology documents, not domains.

boundary_adjustments_triage.priority: LOW — healthy sector, needs expansion not restructuring
boundary_adjustments_triage.recommendation: Accept all 4 proposed space additions. Consider adding exoplanet-characterization and gravitational-wave-astronomy in P3 (both have strong n=6 connections to LIGO noise floor and Kepler mission parameters).
drift_concerns: astronomy and observational-astronomy appear to be duplicates or a parent/child pair. Audit: if observational-astronomy is a specialized subdomain, ensure it has a clear distinction from the parent astronomy domain.

hexa-cosmic and hexa-starship are hexa-prefixed product concepts — consistent with sf-ufo hexa-prefixed concepts. These two could alternatively live in sf-ufo with the other hexa- speculative products.
aerospace and aerospace-transport appear redundant — aerospace should cover transport. Review whether one is a stub.

human_decisions_required.tier_A_approve_in_batch: Low risk + strong mechanism. Accept in one pass if no objection.
human_decisions_required.tier_B_approve_in_batch: Low risk + moderate alien. Accept in one pass if scope fits.
human_decisions_required.tier_C_per_item: Template-only risk or med adversarial risk — decide per entry.
human_decisions_required.new_sectors: All 3 proposals = ABSORB (no new axis). Confirm or override.
human_decisions_required.boundary_MEDIUM: compute (68), infra (57), life (48) → sub-cluster at P3.
